game: Hot Wheels AcceleRacers Collectible Card Game

schema_notes.owned: true = in collection, false = card is missing from collection
schema_notes.artist: null = artist name missing from source data
schema_notes.modability: [] = to be populated from card images (Street / Race / Off-Road icons)
schema_notes.terrain: [] = to be populated from card images (Sand/Mud/Water/Rough/Slick/Paved)
schema_notes.spp_damage: Negative values; 0 means no damage to that stat
schema_notes.notes: Field present only where data-quality issues were detected

rules_summary.object: First player to move 3 Vehicles through all 4 Racing Realms wins.
turn_sequence: 2. Advance all Vehicles that meet or beat the current Realm's Escape Value
3. Play one new Vehicle for free
4. Tune Up — adjust tokens on all cards
5. Spend Action Points (3 base + team bonuses) to play Shifts, Mods, Accelechargers, Hazards

action_points.team_bonus: +1 AP per unique team with 2+ Vehicles in play (max 1 bonus per team)

rules_summary.advancing: Vehicle stack SPP must meet or exceed the Realm Escape Value at the START of your turn.
rules_summary.mods: Permanent; stay with Vehicle as it advances. Require matching Modability Icon.
rules_summary.shifts: Temporary; discarded when Vehicle advances (unless card states otherwise).
rules_summary.accelechargers: Temporary; discarded when Vehicle advances. Only ONE per Vehicle at a time.
rules_summary.hazards: Target opponent Shift/Mod cards. Cannot affect Accelechargers unless card says so.

deck_building.realm_cards: Selected separately; 2 per player brought to table

cards.name: HOLLOWBACK™
cards.ability: When Hollowback is brought into play, return 1 Mod from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: ROLLING THUNDER™
cards.ability: Rolling Thunder can transfer any Mod equipped on it to another Metal Maniac in the same Realm, without spending APs. Modability rules apply.

cards.name: TORQUED HOLLOWBACK™
cards.ability: Salvage some Mods! When Torqued Hollowback is brought into play, you may choose to spend 1 Action Point for every Mod you return from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: TORQUED ROLLING THUNDER™
cards.ability: Without spending APs, Torqued Rolling Thunder can transfer any Mod equipped on it to another Metal Maniac in the same Realm. Modability rules DO NOT apply.

cards.name: HIGH VOLTAGE™
cards.ability: When advancing to the SECOND Realm, High Voltage retains any Shift cards equipped to it.

cards.name: SPECTYTE™
cards.ability: When this hybrid Vehicle is brought into play, return 1 Mod — with any NUMBER listed in its Speed window — from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: HYPER HIGH VOLTAGE™
cards.ability: This Vehicle NEVER discards equipped Shift Cards when it advances to any new Racing Realm.

cards.name: HYPER SPECTYTE™
cards.ability: When Hyper SpecTyte is brought into play, salvage 1 Mod from your junk pile and return it to your hand.

cards.name: ACCELIUM™
cards.ability: When this fusion-powered Vehicle is brought into play, return 1 Mod — with any NUMBER listed in its Performance window — from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: TECHNETIUM™
cards.ability: As long as Technetium remains in play, you may keep up to 8 cards in your hand.

cards.name: VECTRA ACCELIUM™
cards.ability: When Vectra Accelium is brought into play, salvage any 1 Mod from your junk pile and return it to your hand.

cards.name: VECTRA TECHNETIUM™
cards.ability: As long as Vectra Technetium remains in play, you may keep up to 9 cards in your hand.

cards.name: RD03
cards.ability: When RD03 is brought into play, salvage 1 Hazard Card from your junk pile and return it to your hand.

cards.name: RD04
cards.ability: When RD04 is brought into play, salvage 1 Mod — with any NUMBER listed in its Power window — from your junk pile and return it to your hand.

cards.name: RD03.v2
cards.ability: When RD03.v2 is brought into play, salvage 2 Hazard Cards from your junk pile and return them to your hand.

cards.name: RD04.v2
cards.ability: When RD04.v2 is brought into play, salvage any 1 Mod from your junk pile and return it to your hand.

cards.name: FOG REALM
cards.special_rules: No new Shift cards can be equipped to any Vehicle in this Realm.

cards.name: JUNK REALM
cards.special_rules: While in this Realm, ANY Mod can be equipped to ANY Vehicle. Modability rules DO NOT apply. Vehicles retain ALL equipped Mods when they advance from this Realm.

cards.name: SPROUT ROAD
cards.ability: Cancel all Hazards played against a Vehicle stack as long as Sprout Road remains equipped to that Vehicle.

cards.name: FOG VISION
cards.ability: For the Realm in which Fog Vision enters play, you may relocate the SPP Escape Value on YOUR SIDE ONLY. Mark new location with a token. Opponent must use the printed Escape Value. Realm returns to normal when Fog Vision is unequipped.

cards.name: UNDISTORT
cards.ability: When this card comes into play, you may look at your opponent's hand.

cards.name: NIGHT SIGHT
cards.ability: When this card is brought into play, draw two extra cards from your draw pile for free.

cards.name: NAVIGATOR
cards.ability: When this card comes into play, you may equip 1 Shift card for free on ANY Vehicle.

cards.name: BATTERING BUBBLE
cards.ability: Hazards do not affect this Vehicle stack while Battering Bubble remains equipped.

cards.name: PHANTOM FORM
cards.ability: When this card is brought into play, return a Shift card from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: TOTAL TRACTION
cards.ability: Provides enormous traction over WATER, SAND, MUD, SLICK, ROUGH and PAVED terrain.

cards.name: FOLDING CORNERS
cards.ability: Place a token on this card every turn you spend no APs. Each token adds +1 to this card's S, P and P values.

cards.name: 2-D
cards.ability: When a Hazard is played against you, equip 2-D on the targeted Vehicle to cancel the Hazard and send it to your opponent's junk pile.

cards.name: TELEPORT
cards.ability: Protect a Vehicle stack from Hazards for 3 turns. Place 3 tokens on this card; remove 1 each turn during your tune-up phase.

cards.name: SIZE SCALER
cards.ability: This Vehicle can equip ANY Mod while Size Scaler is equipped, and keeps these Mods when Vehicle advances.

cards.name: MEGA BASS BOX
cards.ability: Can only be used by a Teku Racers vehicle.

cards.name: SWEEPERS
cards.ability: Can only be used by a Racing Drones vehicle.

cards.name: ASPHALT ANCHOR
cards.ability: Once equipped, you may junk Asphalt Anchor to cancel 1 Hazard played against any card in the same Realm.

cards.name: CAMO SKIN
cards.ability: Can only be used by a Silencerz vehicle.

cards.name: NITROX³
cards.ability: Mark with 3 tokens. Remove 1 token each turn during your tune-up phase. When all tokens are gone, immediately discard Nitrox³ to your junk pile.

cards.name: ARMORED PLOW
cards.ability: While equipped, cancels all Hazards of 2 AP or less played against this Vehicle stack.

cards.name: SUSPENSION ENHANCERS
cards.ability: Send 1 opposing Vehicle back 1 Realm, discarding everything but Mods. If in first Realm, Vehicle returns to owner's hand after discarding ALL equipped cards.
cards.notes: Ability text may be a data-extraction error; verify against card image.

cards.name: STRATO-THRUSTER™
cards.ability: At the start of your next turn, the Vehicle this equips AUTOMATICALLY ADVANCES to the next Realm and Strato-Thruster is removed to your junk pile.

cards.name: JUMP JETS
cards.ability: When this Mod comes into play, you can draw 1 extra card for free.

cards.name: SHELL SKIN
cards.ability: Protects a Vehicle stack from 2 Hazards. Mark with 2 tokens; remove 1 each time a Hazard is played against its Vehicle stack.

cards.name: SPY EYE
cards.ability: When Spy Eye is brought into play, look at your opponent's hand.

cards.name: AIR REFRESHER
cards.ability: When this Mod comes into play, return one card from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: HARDENED UNDERBELLY
cards.ability: Allows the Vehicle it equips to KEEP 1 SHIFT CARD EQUIPPED when it advances to any new Realm.

cards.name: DRAGON TORCH
cards.ability: Can only be used by a Metal Maniacs vehicle.

cards.name: MOSS GORILLAS
cards.ability: The opposing player must remove ALL Mods from the targeted Vehicle and place them in their junk pile.

cards.name: MUTANT VULTURE
cards.ability: Choose one of your opponent's in-play Accele-Charger cards and remove it to your junk pile.

cards.name: ROCKSLIDE
cards.ability: Cancel the Terrain SPP bonus for any 1 opposing Vehicle while it remains in its current Realm.

cards.name: MOLTEN RIVER
cards.ability: OVERHEAT: Opponent places 4 tokens on the Mod you target, then removes 1 each turn during THEIR tune-up phase. When all tokens are gone, immediately remove that Mod to its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: ICE SHRAPNEL
cards.ability: Remove ALL RACE MODS equipped on ALL opposing Vehicles.

cards.name: WRECKING BALLS
cards.ability: Your opponent cannot play any Mods on their next turn.

cards.name: PROTO-SHARKS
cards.ability: The opposing player cannot play any Shift cards on their next turn.

cards.name: TSUNAMI
cards.ability: Remove ALL STREET MODS equipped on ALL opposing Vehicles.

cards.name: CHROME GLOBES
cards.ability: Your opponent only plays with 3 APs (no team AP bonuses) on their next turn.

cards.name: CHOKE VALVES
cards.notes: Raw data showed -10 for Speed damage; corrected to -1 (likely OCR error).

cards.name: ELECTRIC FRY
cards.ability: Remove 1 equipped Accele-Charger from 1 opposing Vehicle and place in its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: MAGNETIC BOUNCE
cards.ability: Send 1 opposing Vehicle back 1 Realm, discarding everything but Mods. If in first Realm, Vehicle returns to owner's hand after discarding ALL equipped cards.

cards.name: SWEEPER STRIKE
cards.ability: Remove 1 opposing Vehicle stack to its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: ACCELERON VIRUS
cards.ability: Remove 1 Accele-Charger with an AP cost of 3 or less from its Vehicle and place in owner's junk pile.

cards.name: TORNADO VORTEX
cards.ability: Force 2 opposing Vehicles to swap positions on the track. Both remain equipped as they are.

cards.name: ACID BATH
cards.ability: Destroy a Vehicle after 4 turns. Opponent places 4 tokens on the Vehicle you target; removes 1 each turn during THEIR tune-up phase. When the last token is removed, Vehicle is immediately sent to its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: FOREST INFERNO
cards.ability: Look at your opponent's hand, then have them discard 1 card of their choice to their junk pile.

cards.name: BLOWN HYDRANT
cards.ability: Remove 1 Mod of your choice from target Vehicle and send to its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: ESCHER'S WORLD
cards.ability: Remove 1 Shift card of your choice from target Vehicle and place in its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: PICK A LINE
cards.ability: If you have two Vehicles in the same Realm, send one to your junk pile to instantly advance the other out of the Realm. The advancing Vehicle discards everything but Mods.

cards.name: HOT WIRE
cards.ability: When you equip this card, you may choose to transfer 1 Mod from ANY one of your in-play Vehicles to ANY of your other in-play Vehicles. Modability rules apply.

cards.name: ENDURE
cards.ability: This Shift card is immune to all Hazards — it cannot be destroyed.

cards.name: ALL OR NOTHING
cards.ability: Blocks all Hazards against this Vehicle stack for 4 turns. Mark with 4 tokens; remove 1 each tune-up phase. If the Vehicle doesn't advance before tokens run out, immediately remove the Vehicle to your junk pile.

cards.name: REV MATCHING
cards.ability: When this card comes into play, you may equip 1 Accele-Charger card from your hand on any one of your in-play Vehicles for free. Vehicles may NOT have more than one Accele-Charger equipped.

cards.name: BUCKLE UP
cards.ability: When this card comes into play, return 1 Vehicle from your junk pile to the first Realm.

cards.name: GUTS
cards.ability: On the turn that Guts is equipped, you may also equip 1 Mod from your hand on the same Vehicle for free. Modability rules DO NOT apply.

cards.name: DRAFT & PASS
cards.ability: Swap the position of any 2 of your in-play Vehicles from the same team. Swapped Vehicles unequip all but Mods.

cards.name: BOOTLEGGER REVERSE
cards.ability: GAMBLE: You MUST choose an opposing Vehicle in the same Realm and race to reach the next Realm first. The losing Vehicle is immediately removed to its owner's junk pile.

cards.name: HOME TRACK ADVANTAGE
cards.ability: When you equip this card, you may choose to swap the position of any 2 Realm cards on the table.

cards.name: HACK MIMIC
cards.ability: Change this Vehicle's team allegiance. Place a token on the Team icon of your choice — you may only select one team.

cards.name: SHORTCUT
cards.ability: On the turn that Shortcut is equipped, return 1 Shift card from your junk pile to your hand.

cards.name: DRAFT
cards.ability: You can only play Draft if you have 2 Vehicles from the same team in the same Realm, and you must equip it on one of them.

cards.name: DODGING DISASTER
cards.ability: Play at any time to cancel one Hazard, then discard Dodging Disaster to your junk pile.

cards.name: UNDER THE HOOD
cards.ability: When this card comes into play, place a Mod on any one of your in-play Vehicles for free. Modability rules DO NOT apply.
